flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Columbia College fell 35% between 2021 and 2024 (234 → 151).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Columbia College rose 33% between 2017 and 2020 ($6.0k → $7.9k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Columbia College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (75.2% → 85.5%).
